summary: Soundboard recording with distorted audio and buried instruments, performance described as off‑key; reviewers disagree on overall value.
review: One reviewer condemns the sound as muddy and the vocals as unusually out of tune, giving it a single star. Another reviewer sarcastically awards five stars merely to balance the rating and points listeners toward an alternative source, offering no substantive praise for the performance or recording quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Only two reviews with opposing views; one detailed negative assessment of both sound and playing outweighs a non‑evaluative five‑star rating, resulting in a low overall score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Distorted audio, instruments buried under vocals; overall mix described as muddy and unclear.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure or pacing.
